description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in layered casual attire suitable for cool urban environments. He wears a brown bomber-style jacket over a light-colored hoodie, with the hood visible at the neckline. His pants are dark and loose-fitting, featuring a vertical stripe down the side, and he is wearing sturdy work boots. The figure's hands are gloved, and his facial expression is neutral, with short-cropped hair. The overall build is average, and the clothing appears practical for walking or standing outdoors. The textures and proportions are realistic, with attention to garment folds and footwear details.
description: An adult male pedestrian in a brown jacket, hoodie, dark pants with side stripes, gloves, and work boots, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, layered jacket and hoodie, gloved hands, and full details of the boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the jacket's profile, pant stripe, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, pants, and the back of the head and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the jacket's side, pant stripe, and the right profile of the figure.
attribute_clothing_type: casual jacket over hoodie, loose pants with side stripe, gloves
